mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_child_invite.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO CHILD_INVITE ( invite_id, parent_id, invite_code, qr_url ) VALUES ( #{inviteId}, #{parentId}, #{inviteCode}, #{qrUrl} )
mapper.select: SELECT frame_id, frame_type, frame_name, frame_image_url, required_badge_count FROM FRAME WHERE frame_id = #{frameId}
SELECT frame_id, frame_type, frame_name, frame_image_url, required_badge_count FROM FRAME WHERE frame_type = #{frameType}
SELECT frame_id, frame_type, frame_name, frame_image_url, required_badge_count FROM FRAME ORDER BY required_badge_count, frame_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHILD_PET WHERE child_id = #{childId} AND badge_acquired = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_child.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO CHILD ( child_id, parent_id, invite_id, frame_id, nickname, character_image_url, character_level ) VALUES ( #{childId}, #{parentId}, #{inviteId}, #{frameId}, #{nickname}, #{characterImageUrl}, #{characterLevel} )
mapper.select: SELECT c.child_id, c.parent_id, c.invite_id, c.frame_id, c.nickname, c.character_image_url, c.character_level, c.created_at, i.invite_code, f.frame_type FROM CHILD c JOIN CHILD_INVITE i ON i.invite_id = c.invite_id JOIN FRAME f ON f.frame_id = c.frame_id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY c.child_id

SELECT c.child_id, c.parent_id, c.invite_id, c.frame_id, c.nickname, c.character_image_url, c.character_level, c.created_at, i.invite_code, f.frame_type FROM CHILD c JOIN CHILD_INVITE i ON i.invite_id = c.invite_id JOIN FRAME f ON f.frame_id = c.frame_id WHERE i.invite_code = #{inviteCode}

SELECT c.child_id, c.parent_id, c.invite_id, c.frame_id, c.nickname, c.character_image_url, c.character_level, c.created_at, i.invite_code, f.frame_type FROM CHILD c JOIN CHILD_INVITE i ON i.invite_id = c.invite_id JOIN FRAME f ON f.frame_id = c.frame_id WHERE c.child_id = #{childId}
